title: phillyrea latifolia subsp. stricta
intro: Phillyrea latifolia subsp. stricta, also known as the strict or narrow-leaved Phillyrea, is a subspecies of the Phillyrea latifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. The plant's leaves and bark contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering various health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Phillyrea latifolia subsp. stricta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used as a flavoring agent in cooking, particularly in traditional Mediterranean cuisine.
